---
Before you submit, a quick sanity check (delete if not relevant):

- No real URLs or secrets — use `example.com` placeholders, and don't commit `ISHRemote.PesterSetup.Debug.ps1`.
- New/changed cmdlet has a matching `*.Tests.ps1` and updated `///` help.
- Renaming a public cmdlet parameter or `Ish*` object member is a breaking change — flag it for the maintainer.
